name: dchat-desktop
description: D Chat Desktop - Cross-platform AI chat application

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @dchat/backend && npm run test -w @dchat/frontend
scripts.test:perf:report: node -e "try{require('fs').unlinkSync('perf/report/perf-data.ndjson')}catch{}" && vitest run --config perf/vitest.config.ts; tsx perf/report/generate-html.ts
scripts.build:package: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && node scripts/prepare-backend-deps.mjs
scripts.build:package:mac: npm run build:package && cd packages/electron && npx electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.build:package:win: npm run build:package && cd packages/electron && npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
